title: Corrupter (disambiguation)
content:
'''Corrupter''' (also spelled as '''Corruptor''') can refer to multiple subjects:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Corrupter]]''''', a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Empire]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Corrupter/Legends|'''''Corrupter''''']], a [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*[[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|'''''Corrupter''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] used by the Galactic Empire
*'''[[Corrupter Task Force]]''', a [[Task force/Legends|task force]] led by the ''Imperial'' class ''Corrupter''
*'''[[Corrupter repair convoy]]''', a repair convoy assigned to assist the ''Imperial'' class ''Corrupter''
*'''[[Corruptor Zero]]''', a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] belonging to the [[Dread Host]]
*'''[[Kinetic corruptor]]''', massive machines used to extract energy from [[Baradium/Legends|baradium]] deposits

{{Disambig}}
